# Security Policy

## Reporting a Vulnerability

If you discover a security vulnerability, please email security@xenon-blade-dash.com instead of using the issue tracker.

## Supported Versions

| Version | Supported          |
| ------- | ------------------ |
| 1.0.x   | :white_check_mark: |
| < 1.0   | :x:                |

## Security Updates

Security updates will be released as soon as possible after discovery.
